title: Hey Siri Ve Siri
desc: An elite Punjabi family living in Britain invite folks from their village in India to live with them. However, this leads to cultural clashes and give rise to tensions in the household.

title: Back to Back Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular and foot-tapping songs and compositions is played back to back to entertain the audience.

title: Sass Meri Ne Munda Jamya
desc: Happiness fills the house when Harmeet's wife Keerat gets pregnant. However, trouble follows when the family learns that Harmeet's mother is also expecting.

title: Har Har Mahadev
desc: Lord Shiva, an ascetic, and Goddess Shakti create the cosmos together. They separate for creation's sake, but reunite when she is reborn as Goddess Parvati.

title: Crime Stories
desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life criminal incidents that revolve around harassment, murder and kidnappings.

title: mh1 (Music)
desc: Jaggi and Raunak love each other and wish to get married. However, they face several challenges in their quest to unite.

title: Thappa
desc: When a small-town reporter's fake video about ghosts succeeds, he uses his success to buy a new house. However, when the building turns out to be haunted, his life turns upside down.

title: Jannatan
desc: An Indian-origin woman thrives in Canada, but yearns for romance. However, a chance meeting with an international student in Vancouver changes her life's tracks.

title: Paath Sri Sukhmani Sahib
desc: A Sikh guru addresses a gathering of devotes and recites spiritual hymns from the Guru Granth Sahib and focuses on the significance of peace and remembering God.

title: Sarab Sanjhi Gurbani
desc: A curated compilation of Sikh religious and sacred songs, performed in devotion to praising the Almighty, is played back to back.

title: Devotional Songs / Mantra
desc: A curated collection of various devotional songs and prayers, performed by devotees to praise the Almighty and seek blessings.

title: Aarti From Maa Vaishno Devi Darbar
desc: Hindu priests perform ceremonial rituals as an act of worship and devotion amidst sacred chants at the shrine of Maa Vaishno Devi, seeking divine blessings for a fulfilled life.

desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular and foot-tapping songs and compositions is played back to back to entertain the audience.

title: Nikka Zaildaar 3
desc: Nikka's life takes a hilarious turn when his grandfather, who is a miser, dies after being pickpocketed and his soul enters Nikka's body.

title: Har Har Mahadev
desc: Sati dismisses her servant and gathers the blossoms on her own. Daksha orders the exile of craftsmen from the community. Sage Dadhichi extends shelter to these artisans at his hermitage.

title: Mindo Taseeldarni
desc: A middle-aged man lies about having an affair with a woman named Mindo Taseeldarni to evade marriage. However, things change when he finds out that the woman he likes is also named Mindo Taseeldarni.
